nodes.label: Dual layout
nodes.rationale: Two load paths: pip namespace package and Hermes flat-entry loader.

nodes.label: Plugin Interface (Hermes ABC)
nodes.rationale: CashewMemoryProvider implements MemoryProvider ABC with specific contracts for lifecycle, threading, and retrieval.

nodes.label: Profile Isolation
nodes.rationale: All file paths scoped under hermes_home; never hardcode ~/.hermes.
